offer: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients/month, inefficient report compilation causes late submissions to clients. We automate the report generation instead of manual compilation of expense reports.
problem: Inefficient compilation of monthly expense reports from credit card transactions.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for sharing accounting tools
try_it: Let users manually enter credit card transactions and generate summaries
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
